title: $500 fiber optic HDMI cable delivers flawless 48 Gbps performance across a staggering 990 feet crushes 8K at 60 Hz and 4K at 120 Hz over long distances
summary: High-end fiber-optic HDMI cables can maintain bandwidth over long distances, delivering flawless 48 Gbps performance. This allows for smooth 8K at 60 Hz and 4K at 120 Hz across 990 feet. It provides clarity in an otherwise confusing HDMI standard.
insight: Long-distance HDMI performance is now possible with high-end fiber-optic cables.

title: Intel Arrow Lake Refresh CPU prices shot up to 17% above MSRP just 48 hours after launch dynamic pricing trumps manufacturer's recommended pricing
summary: Intel's Arrow Lake Refresh CPU prices surged 17% above MSRP within 48 hours. This price hike compromises the excellent price-to-performance ratio of the Core Ultra 200S Plus series. The sudden increase may deter potential buyers.
insight: Dynamic pricing undermines manufacturer's recommended pricing.

title: Samsung 49-inch OLED Odyssey G9 hits unbelievable all-time low of $799 gaming monitor comes with a free copy of Resident Evil Requiem
summary: Samsung's 49-inch OLED Odyssey G9 reaches an all-time low price of $799.99, offering strong value for gamers and productivity enthusiasts.
insight: Unbeatable price for high-end gaming and productivity display technology.

title: Radeon RX 9070 XT bundle bonanza includes free SSDs, AIO coolers, and power supplies for $699 Red Team rescues gamers with reasonably-priced GPU bundles
summary: The AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT drops to $699 with bundled extras, offering a better overall value in a volatile market.
insight: AMD provides value with bundled deals in a competitive GPU market.

title: Samsung preps PCIe 5.0 QLC SSD with a controller based on open-source RISC-V architecture BM9K1 delivers speeds up to 11.4 GB/s for 'personal AI workloads'
summary: Samsung is preparing a PCIe 5.0 QLC SSD with a RISC-V BM9K1 controller, delivering speeds up to 11.4 GB/s, 1.6 times faster than its predecessor.
insight: Breakthrough in storage speeds for AI workloads and applications

title: Microsoft's new gaming boss axed 'This is an Xbox' campaign because 'it didn't feel like Xbox' Xbox brand undergoes transformation to redefine its identity
summary: Microsoft's new gaming boss, Asha Sharma, canceled the 'This is an Xbox' campaign due to backlash.
insight: Effective leadership acknowledges and adapts to consumer feedback and criticism.

title: Sony freezes memory card orders in Japan amid growing storage crisis the company attributes the cause to shortage of semiconductors
summary: Sony Japan has stopped accepting orders for most memory cards due to a semiconductor shortage. The halt affects CFexpress and SD memory cards, a significant blow to professionals and enthusiasts. Orders placed before March 27 will be fulfilled, but new orders are not accepted.
insight: Semiconductor shortage cripples Sony's memory card production significantly worldwide.

title: Win a prize by entering your build into the inaugural Tom's Hardware Rig Rundown submit a build to get your setup evaluated by our expert staff
summary: Enter the Tom's Hardware Rig Rundown for a chance to win a prize and have your build evaluated by experts, getting insights to improve your setup.
insight: Showcase your build, get expert feedback, and win a gift card.

title: Asus ROG Swift PG34WCDN 34-inch QD-OLED 360 Hz gaming monitor review: New levels of speed and brightness
summary: The Asus ROG Swift PG34WCDN is a 34-inch curved ultra-wide monitor that boasts 360 Hz refresh rate, HDR500, and Quantum Dot color, setting a new standard for speed and brightness in the WQHD segment.
insight: Ultra-high refresh rate meets vibrant Quantum Dot color technology.

title: Meta to fund seven new natural gas power plants to fuel AI data centers Entergy partnership to deliver 7 gigawatts of power for Louisiana AI facility
summary: Meta is funding seven new natural gas plants to power its Louisiana data center, expanding fossil fuel infrastructure for its AI buildout.
insight: Meta's reliance on fossil fuels undermines its AI sustainability claims.

title: Chinese universities performing military research acquired Super Micro servers with sanctioned Nvidia AI chips public documents reveal purchases were completed in 2025 and 2026 despite US export controls
summary: Four Chinese universities, including PLA affiliates, acquired Nvidia AI servers under US export controls.
insight: Lax enforcement of export controls enables Chinese military AI development.

title: Hong Kong border agents and police can demand device passwords, including from US citizens, under penalty of imprisonment border controls become more invasive worldwide
summary: Hong Kong border agents can demand device passwords under penalty of imprisonment, affecting US citizens and travelers worldwide.
insight: Invasive border controls erode digital privacy and freedom globally.

title: Razer Kiyo V2 Review: USB-C required
summary: The Razer Kiyo V2 is a high-resolution webcam offering 4K / 30 fps video, a built-in privacy shutter, and requires a USB-C connection for optimal performance.
insight: Optimal 4K performance requires a specific USB-C connection only.

title: Ambitious modder bolts a 360mm server AIO onto an RTX 3080, slashes VRAM temps in half enormous workstation cooler powers 54 degree drop, 9% performance uplift
summary: A modder installed a 360mm server AIO onto an RTX 3080, resulting in significantly reduced VRAM temperatures and a 9% performance uplift.
insight: Massive server coolers can offer substantial performance boosts for extreme workloads.

title: Minisforum AI X1 Pro 470 review: AMD's Gorgon Point in a sleek mini PC desktop
summary: The Minisforum AI X1 Pro 470 is a mini PC desktop that offers a slight upgrade over its predecessor with minimal price increase, making it a suitable option for those who need a performance boost without breaking the bank.
insight: Incremental updates provide affordable performance upgrades for mini PC users

title: Lucky PC builder scores brand new RTX 5060 Ti worth $420 for just $80 at Walmart clearance sale find saves buyer hundreds upgrading from a GTX 1060
summary: A Walmart clearance sale offered an MSI Ventus 2X RTX 5060 Ti for $80, significantly cheaper than its usual price.
insight: Massive GPU price drop during clearance sale saves buyers hundreds.

title: Apple s Mac OS X turns 25, has prospered across three hardware architecture changes from PowerPC, through Intel x86, to Apple Silicon
summary: Mac OS X has successfully transitioned to three hardware architectures over 25 years.
insight: Adaptability and innovation have driven Mac OS X's enduring success.

title: Trucker shows off $6,000 PC driving sim rig in passenger seat driver slides over to RTX 5080-powered setup when stuck in traffic
summary: A trucker showcases a $6,000 PC gaming setup in their vehicle, utilizing it to play games during traffic jams. When stuck, they slide over to this setup, powered by an RTX 5080, for an enhanced gaming experience. This setup allows them to make the most of their time on the road.
insight: Gamers find creative ways to optimize time, even in unexpected situations.

title: DIYer upcycles an old PC PSU into a flexible bench power supply 20-year-old relic rescued from dusty neglect
summary: Upcycle an old PC PSU into a flexible bench power supply with a DIY project, giving a 20-year-old relic a new life.
insight: Reduce electronic waste by repurposing old components creatively.

title: M5Stack Stamp-P4 A tiny ESP32-P4 USB-C board with optional Wi-Fi 6 and Bluetooth 5.4
summary: M5Stack Stamp-P4 is a compact ESP32-P4 development board with Wi-Fi 6 and Bluetooth 5.4, featuring 16MB Flash, 32MB PSRAM, and a range of interfaces, including MIPI-CSI camera and MIPI DSI display interfaces.
insight: Compact ESP32-P4 board enables IoT projects with advanced connectivity options.

title: TerraMaster F2-425 Plus NAS review Part 2: Configuration, benchmarks, and AI-enhanced media storage
summary: This review continues the testing of the TerraMaster F2-425 Plus NAS, focusing on its configuration, performance, and AI-enhanced media features.
insight: AI-powered media storage enhances user experience with efficient organization capabilities.

title: Luckfox Lume A compact Allwinner T153 SBC with dual GbE, PoE, GPIO header, and MIPI interfaces for industrial HMI applications
summary: Luckfox Lume is a compact industrial SBC featuring Allwinner T153 SoC with Gigabit Ethernet, PoE, and MIPI interfaces, suitable for HMI applications.
insight: Low-power industrial SBC for efficient HMI and IoT deployments

title: Alibaba XuanTie C950 A powerful, RVA23-compliant 64-bit RISC-V core for Edge AI computing
summary: Alibaba has introduced the XuanTie C950, a high-performance 64-bit RISC-V core for Edge AI computing, compliant with RVA23 profile and supporting various extensions. The core supports up to 8 cores per cluster, clocked at 3.2 GHz, and integrates with the XuanTie TPE IP for tensor processing. It targets applications such as cloud computing, edge computing, and AI computing.
insight: Accelerating Edge AI with high-performance, scalable RISC-V architecture.

title: Copper and liquid cooling mods double MacBook Neo performance while cutting temps by 20 C
summary: ETA Prime's modifications to the MacBook Neo using copper plating and an external thermoelectric cooler significantly enhance gaming performance and reduce temperatures by 20 C.
insight: Copper plating and thermoelectric cooling boost MacBook Neo's performance and efficiency

title: This app makes your MacBook moan when you slap it, and it's going viral
summary: A viral social media clip inspired an app that simulates a MacBook's reaction to being slapped.
insight: Social media influence can spark creative and humorous technological innovations.

title: Samsung's new QuantumBlack coating reduces QD-OLED reflections by 20%
summary: Samsung's QuantumBlack coating reduces reflections on QD-OLED panels by 20%. It enhances immersion and improves surface hardness. QuantumBlack will be a standard feature on 2026 QD-OLED monitors.
insight: Improved immersion for viewers with reduced reflections and increased screen durability.

title: Dolby sues Snap over video codec patents tied to AV1 and HEVC
summary: Dolby sues Snap for infringing video compression patents over HEVC and AV1 use.
insight: Patent disputes could impact adoption of emerging video compression standards.

title: Fake Samsung 990 Pro SSD is good enough to fool your benchmarks
summary: A counterfeit Samsung 990 Pro SSD was found to match the genuine article's speed and storage, making it difficult to distinguish between the two.
insight: Counterfeit SSDs can now convincingly match genuine performance specs.

title: Intel Core Ultra 7 270K Plus Review: AMD Needs to Respond
summary: The Intel Core Ultra 7 270K Plus offers improved performance with more cores and cache at a higher price, potentially making it a strong value for high-end productivity workloads.
insight: Intel's new CPU may leave AMD struggling to compete in the high-end market.
